data.title: Cloud-Based Infrastructure
data.description: Instagram relies on cloud services for scalable and efficient operations.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes AWS and Facebook's custom infrastructure for data storage and content delivery.

data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Distributed microservices handle different functionalities of Instagram.
data.technical_spec: Divided into multiple services that operate independently but cohesively.

data.title: RESTful API
data.description: Provides RESTful API for communication between client and server.
data.technical_spec: Follows standard REST principles with JSON data exchange.

data.title: High Availability Systems
data.description: Ensures service uptime through robust infrastructure.
data.technical_spec: Redundancies, load balancing, and failover systems in place.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Utilizes CDN to distribute content efficiently.
data.technical_spec: Geographically distributed edge servers for rapid content delivery.
